isNew.description: Whether the product is a new arrival

isBestSeller.description: Whether the product is a best seller

isTopRated.description: Whether the product is top rated

UserUpload.title: User Upload
UserUpload.description: An image uploaded by a user

userId.description: The ID of the user who uploaded the image

imageUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded image

PageContent.title: Page Content
PageContent.description: Content for a specific page (Home, Shop, Design, About)

heroTitle.description: The main title for the page hero section

heroSubtitle.description: The subtitle for the page hero section

heroImage.description: The background image for the page hero section

content.description: The main body content for the page

updatedAt.description: When the page content was last updated

/products/{productId}.description: Collection of all products in the store

/page_content/{pageId}.description: Collection of content for each page
